title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): Follow Your Heart

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin crosses the finish line in the autumn
Tenno Sho alongside the dreams of many, with a
smile of pure joy on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her doubts are gone. She's going to keep
enjoying running for herself. And I bet she'll turn
all those cheers into her driving force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For our next race, too, we should go with the one
she'll enjoy most. We decide on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to set the Japan Cup, a race in which
runners from around the world compete, as our
goal. It's time for Ines and I to get our prep work
started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Arima Kinen.

The Arima Kinen, a race that draws the attention
of many racing fans, makes for a fitting goal. It's
time for Ines and I to get our prep work started.
